query: motion blur photograph long exposure subject in motion
message: anti-aesthetic / clarity_and_focus / intentional_blur: motion blur, long exposure subject motion - artistic streaks and dynamic blur

response.objective_caption: Irregular streaks of color including green, teal, blue, purple, orange, and red sweep diagonally across a predominantly black background, forming soft overlapping ribbons of light with no discernible solid objects or figures.
response.anti_aesthetic_caption: Soft, indistinct ribbons of green, teal, blue, purple, orange, and red light streak diagonally across deep blackness, their forms intentionally blurred and lacking any fine detail or recognizable subject matter, dissolving into pure color and gesture in an abstract composition where edges dissolve and no surfaces resolve into coherent form.
